name: Aleda Wash K10
comment:
Aleda  K10: The A.leda Wash K10 is a powerful RGBW LED washlight that can display vibrant colors as well as a variety of pastel and white tones. Each color of an individual LED can be controlled separately and therefore offers a wide range of effects and functions.

Other features of the A.leda Washlight series include virtually silent operation, a variable CTO, 16-bit channels for the dimmers and the RGB colors, which enable uniform dimming and smooth color transitions. The series also has an extensive effects library.

gwSpecs.description:
The A.leda Wash K10 is a powerful RGBW LED washlight that can display vibrant colors as well as a variety of pastel and white tones. Each color of an individual LED can be controlled separately and therefore offers a wide range of effects and functions.

Other features of the A.leda Washlight series include virtually silent operation, a variable CTO, 16-bit channels for the dimmers and the RGB colors, which enable uniform dimming and smooth color transitions. The series also has an extensive effects library.
